0.text: Findings consistent with emphysema in the lungs

1.text: Subpleural 2 mm nodule in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: Faint and centrally located ground-glass opacities in the anteromediobasal segment of the left lower lobe

3.text: Faint and centrally located ground-glass opacities in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Small air cysts adjacent to the bronchi in the apicoposterior segment
